codes.term: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 2 (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neovascular glaucoma is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes mellitus itself; term does not name the primary condition.

codes.term: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 1 (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neovascular glaucoma is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes mellitus itself; term does not name the primary condition.

codes.term: Neurotrophic keratitis due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neurotrophic keratitis is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes mellitus itself; term does not name the primary condition.

codes.term: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus is a complication (diabetic nephropathy), not an instance of diabetes mellitus itself.

codes.term: Peripheral angiopathy due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Peripheral angiopathy due to diabetes mellitus is a complication, not an instance of diabetes mellitus itself.

codes.term: Neuropathic arthropathy due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neuropathic arthropathy due to diabetes mellitus is a complication, not an instance of diabetes mellitus itself.
Mononeuropathy due to diabetes mellitus is a complication (diabetic neuropathy), not an instance of diabetes itself.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus with ulcer (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type I diabetes mellitus with ulcer represents a complication (diabetic foot ulcer), not an instance of diabetes itself.

codes.term: Multiple complications due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
codes.rationale: Multiple complications due to type 2 diabetes mellitus names complications, not an instance of diabetes itself.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus with ulcer (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type II diabetes mellitus with ulcer represents a complication (diabetic foot ulcer), not an instance of diabetes itself.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus with gangrene
codes.rationale: Type II diabetes mellitus with gangrene represents a complication, not an instance of diabetes itself.

codes.term: Rubeosis iridis due to type 1 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Rubeosis iridis is an ocular complication of type 1 diabetes, not an instance of diabetes mellitus itself, despite the term naming the condition.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus maturity onset (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type I diabetes mellitus maturity onset is ambiguous; maturity-onset presentation in type 1 diabetes is a recognized variant but may be clinically contentious.
Diabetes mellitus in remission represents a resolved state; inclusion depends on whether remission codes should be included in primary diabetes lists.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type I diabetes mellitus in remission represents a resolved state; inclusion depends on whether remission codes should be included in primary diabetes lists.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type II diabetes mellitus in remission represents a resolved state; inclusion depends on whether remission codes should be included in primary diabetes lists.

summary: Recall: 66.3% (57 of 86 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 96.6%. F1: 78.6%. 12 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Direct instance of diabetes mellitus without complication; core diagnostic code for the condition.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus type 2 without retinopathy (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without retinopathy is a direct instance of type 2 diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Insulin treated type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Insulin treated type 2 diabetes mellitus is a direct instance of type 2 diabetes mellitus with a treatment descriptor.

scored_codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type I diabetes mellitus without complication is a direct instance of type 1 diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type II diabetes mellitus without complication is a direct instance of type 2 diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: This is the generic diabetes mellitus code representing the primary condition itself.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus type 2 (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 2 diabetes mellitus is a primary clinical subtype of diabetes mellitus and is a core code for this condition.

scored_codes.term: Diabetes mellitus type 1 (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes mellitus is a primary clinical subtype of diabetes mellitus and is a core code for this condition.

scored_codes.term: Lipoatrophic diabetes mellitus without complication (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Lipoatrophic diabetes mellitus is a recognized clinical subtype of diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Brittle diabetes mellitus (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: Brittle diabetes mellitus is a recognized clinical severity variant of diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Secondary endocrine diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Secondary endocrine diabetes mellitus is a recognized clinical subtype of diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Brittle type I diabetes mellitus (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: Brittle type I diabetes mellitus is a recognized clinical severity variant of type 1 diabetes mellitus.

scored_codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus with hypoglycemic coma
scored_codes.rationale: Type 1 diabetes with hypoglycemic coma is a direct manifestation of type 1 diabetes mellitus and should be included in a primary diabetes list.

scored_codes.term: Secondary diabetes mellitus (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Secondary diabetes mellitus is a clinical subtype of diabetes mellitus, representing the primary condition with a specific etiology.
